case_title: LENDINGCLUB CORPORATION VS. EVANGELINA SANTOS ET AL

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LENDINGCLUB CORPORATION AS TO DEFENDANT SANTOS, EVANGELINA DOES 1 TO 5 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  FEB-11-2019
